ArtifactMetadata.Summary: Extended store settlement methods to accept third-party transaction reference IDs in app-store.ts.

Description: Add support for razorpay reference IDs in app-store.ts completeOnlinePayment method.
Instruction: Extend completeOnlinePayment signature and database write parameters in app-store.ts.

ReplacementChunks.ReplacementContent: completeOnlinePayment: (deliveryId: string, paymentMethod: string, amount: number, gatewayReference?: string) => Promise<void>;
ReplacementChunks.TargetContent: completeOnlinePayment: (deliveryId: string, paymentMethod: string, amount: number) => Promise<void>;

ReplacementChunks.ReplacementContent:
transaction.set(transactionRef, {
          transactionId,
          paymentId,
          deliveryId,
          amount,
          status: "success",
          paymentMethod,
          gatewayReference: gatewayReference || `SIMULATED_${paymentMethod.toUpperCase()}_GATEWAY`,
          createdAt: serverTimestamp(),
          performedBy: "customer",
        });
ReplacementChunks.TargetContent:
transaction.set(transactionRef, {
          transactionId,
          paymentId,
          deliveryId,
          amount,
          status: "success",
          paymentMethod,
          gatewayReference: `SIMULATED_${paymentMethod.toUpperCase()}_GATEWAY`,
          createdAt: serverTimestamp(),
          performedBy: "customer",
        });
